qa_pair.question: A WWDC 2024 session introduces SwiftUI's declarative syntax for UI across Apple platforms. What is the canonical session id used by this MCP server for "SwiftUI essentials"?
WWDC 2025 unveiled Apple's on-device language-model framework. A session titled "Meet Foundation Models" documents it — what is its canonical session id?
Apple's tutorials are published as DocC JSON under one base path on developer.apple.com. What is that base path (the path prefix that comes before `{slug}.json`)?
The wwdc-mcp-server uses a Swift Evolution proposal id format like `SE-0428` pulled from apple/swift-evolution. What prefix string does every proposal id start with?
The wwdc-mcp-server uses a local embedding model served by Ollama for semantic search. What is the default model name?
What is the default port the wwdc-mcp-server expects Ollama to be listening on?
The wwdc_session_deep_link tool adds a query parameter so a session URL jumps to a specific time. What is that parameter name?
The wwdc-mcp-server response truncation threshold is tuned to keep outputs within a specific character budget. What is that CHARACTER_LIMIT value?
Tool names in this server follow a service-prefix convention. All general WWDC search/list/get tools begin with which 5-character prefix?
The wwdc-mcp-server stores its local index in a SQLite file. What is the default filename written under the project's data/ directory?
